HYLATECHNIK IS THE EXPERIENCED SPECIALIST FOR FORMING TECHNOLOGY
and has been a long-standing partner and problem solver for numerous customers in Germany and abroad. Founded in 1966 by Paul Chrubasik in Ilsfeld, Hylatechnik can now look back on more than 50 years of successful company history
Innovative
As an experienced forming specialist, we think uniquely. Creative in development and with technical know-how in the implementation of complex processes.
Personally
Every project requires smooth communication. We grant this through a personal and partnership-based cooperation in the implementation of your projects.
Flexible
We can respond to your requirements quickly, competently and reliably. Whether new system development, repair and service on site or when optimizing your press. Our specialists are at your side.
BLANKING SHOCK DAMPERS
Protects expensive machine investments, reduces vibrations and noise.
To the product portfolio
